files.patch:
@@ -462,7 +462,7 @@ final class OnboardingFlowController: ObservableObject {
         self.speechTranscriber = speechTranscriber
         self.sleep = sleep
         self.onComplete = onComplete
-        microphoneStatus = microphonePermission.authorizationStatus()
+        microphoneStatus = .notDetermined
         self.levelMonitor.onLevelChange = { [weak self] level in
             self?.microphoneLevel = level
         }

@@ -86,6 +86,16 @@ end run
 APPLESCRIPT
 }
 
+microphone_tcc_events() {
+  /usr/bin/log show \
+    --style compact \
+    --last 30s \
+    --predicate "process == \"tccd\" AND (eventMessage CONTAINS \"pid=$APP_PID\" OR eventMessage CONTAINS \"msgID=$APP_PID.\")" \
+    2>/dev/null |
+    rg 'kTCCServiceMicrophone|service=kTCCServiceMicrophone|AUTHREQ_PROMPTING' ||
+    true
+}
+
 if defaults export "$BUNDLE_ID" - >"$BACKUP_PLIST" 2>/dev/null; then
   HAD_PREFERENCES=1
 fi
@@ -130,7 +140,13 @@ if [[ "$STATE" == "ready" ]]; then
 fi
 
 if [[ "$STATE" == "ready" ]]; then
-  echo "PASS: onboarding window appeared without an early modal permission sheet"
+  if [[ -n "$(microphone_tcc_events)" ]]; then
+    STATE="microphone-tcc"
+  fi
+fi
+
+if [[ "$STATE" == "ready" ]]; then
+  echo "PASS: onboarding window appeared without early microphone TCC activity or a modal permission sheet"
   exit 0
 fi
